connection: Four contain a smaller number word hidden within their spelling: NINETEEN has NINE, FOURTEEN has FOUR, SEVENTEEN has SEVEN, EIGHTEEN has EIGHT. THIRTY contains no number word.
hints: Look at the letters, not the numerical value.
Each word might be hiding something inside it.
Four of them contain another number word spelled out within them.
NINETEEN has NINE, FOURTEEN has FOUR, SEVENTEEN has SEVEN, EIGHTEEN has EIGHT — THIRTY contains no hidden number word.
